metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: GoogleSecOps data connector with template version 3.0.0

connectorUiConfig.title: Google SecOps Detection Alerts
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Google SecOps](https://cloud.google.com/security/products/security-operations) (formerly Chronicle) data connector provides the capability to ingest detection alerts from Google SecOps into Microsoft Sentinel using the [legacyStreamDetectionAlerts](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest/v1alpha/projects.locations.instances.legacy/legacyStreamDetectionAlerts) API. Refer to [API documentation](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest) for more information. The connector provides the ability to get detection alert data which helps to examine potential security threats, investigate rule-based detections, and respond to incidents identified by Google SecOps.

sampleQueries.query:
DetectionAlerts_CL
 | sort by detection_time desc
 | take 10

DetectionAlerts_CL
 | summarize Count=count() by severity
 | sort by Count desc

DetectionAlerts_CL
 | where alert_state == 'ALERTING'
 | summarize Count=count() by rule_name
 | sort by Count desc
 | take 10

DetectionAlerts_CL
 | extend Hour = bin(detection_time, 1h)
 | summarize Count=count() by Hour, severity
 | render columnchart

dataTypes.name: DetectionAlerts_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
DetectionAlerts_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

value:
DetectionAlerts_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions on the workspace are required.
Write permissions to Data Collection Rules are required.
Write permissions to Data Collection Endpoints are required.

customs.name: Microsoft.Web/sites permissions
customs.description: Read and write permissions to Azure Functions to create a Function App is required. [See the documentation to learn more about Azure Functions](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-functions/).

customs.name: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts permissions
customs.description: Read and write permissions to Azure Storage Account for File Share operations are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra ID App Registration
customs.description: An app registration with API permissions for Azure Monitor Ingestion is required for posting data to Sentinel.

customs.name: Google Cloud Service Account
customs.description: A Google Cloud service account with SecOps API access is required. The service account JSON key must be provided during deployment. [See the documentation to learn more about Google SecOps API access](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest).

instructionSteps.description:
>**NOTE:** This connector uses two Azure Functions to connect to the Google SecOps API:
- **GoogleSecOpsToStorage**: Polls the Google SecOps API on a configurable schedule and saves raw detection batches to Azure File Share.
- **AzureStorageToSentinel**: Monitors the file share and ingests saved detections into Microsoft Sentinel via the Logs Ingestion API (DCR).

>**NOTE:** This connector uses Azure Functions and Azure Storage, which may result in additional data ingestion and operational costs. Check the [Azure Functions pricing page](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/functions/) and [Azure Storage pricing page](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/storage/blobs/) for details.

**STEP 1 - Configuration steps for Google SecOps Service Account**

1. Sign in to the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) and select the **project** associated with your Google SecOps instance.
2. From the project selector at the top, note the **Project ID** — this is the **GoogleSecopsProjectId** parameter.
3. Navigate to **IAM & Admin > Service Accounts** and click **Create Service Account**.
4. Enter a name (e.g., `secops-sentinel-sa`) and click **Create and Continue**.
5. Assign a role that includes the permission: `chronicle.legacies.legacyStreamDetectionAlerts`.
6. Click **Done**, then click the newly created service account from the list.
7. Go to the **Keys** tab, click **Add Key > Create new key**, select **JSON**, and click **Create**. Save the downloaded file.
8. The full text content of the downloaded JSON file is the **GoogleSecopsServiceAccountJson** parameter.

> To find **GoogleSecopsRegion** and **GoogleSecopsInstanceId**: sign in to the [Google SecOps console](https://chronicle.security), go to **Settings > SIEM Settings**, and note the **Region** and **Instance ID** values displayed there.

**STEP 2 - App Registration steps for the Application in Microsoft Entra ID**

This integration requires an App registration in the Azure portal. Follow the steps below to create a new application in Microsoft Entra ID:
1. Sign in to the [Azure portal](https://portal.azure.com/).
2. Search for and select **Microsoft Entra ID**.
3. Under **Manage**, select **App registrations > New registration**.
4. Enter a display **Name** for your application (e.g., `gcs-detection-alerts-app`).
5. Select **Register** to complete the initial app registration.
6. When registration finishes, the Azure portal displays the app registration's **Overview** pane. Note the **Application (client) ID** — this is the **AzureClientId** parameter. Note the **Directory (tenant) ID** — this is the **TenantId** parameter.

> **Reference link:** [https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/quickstart-register-app](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/quickstart-register-app)

**STEP 3 - Add a client secret for the application in Microsoft Entra ID**

Sometimes called an application password, a client secret is a string value required by this data connector. Follow the steps below to create a new Client Secret:
1. In the Azure portal, in **App registrations**, select your application.
2. Select **Certificates & secrets > Client secrets > New client secret**.
3. Add a description for your client secret.
4. Select an expiration for the secret or specify a custom lifetime. Limit is 24 months.
5. Select **Add**.
6. *Record the secret's **Value** for use as the **AzureClientSecret** parameter. This secret value is never displayed again after you leave this page.*

> **Reference link:** [https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/quickstart-register-app#add-a-client-secret](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/quickstart-register-app#add-a-client-secret)

**STEP 4 - Get Object ID of your application in Microsoft Entra ID**

After creating your app registration, follow the steps below to get the Object ID required for the DCR role assignment:
1. Go to **Microsoft Entra ID**.
2. Select **Enterprise applications** from the left menu.
3. Search for and click your newly created application.
4. On the **Overview** page, copy the **Object ID** — this is the **AzureEntraObjectID** parameter.

**STEP 5 - Get Log Analytics Workspace details**

1. In the Azure portal, navigate to your **Log Analytics workspace**.
2. On the **Overview** page, copy the **Name** of the workspace — this is the **WorkspaceName** parameter.
3. From the left menu, go to **Settings > Properties**.
4. Copy the **Resource ID** value — this is the **AppInsightsWorkspaceResourceID** parameter. It follows the format:
   `/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}`

Use this method for automated deployment of the Google SecOps Detection Alerts connector.

1. Click the **Deploy to Azure** button below.

	[![Deploy To Azure](https://aka.ms/deploytoazurebutton)](https://portal.azure.com/#create/Microsoft.Template/uri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdevendra-chavda%2FGoogleSecOps%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2FData%2520Connectors%2FGoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts%2Fazuredeploy_Connector_GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts_API_AzureFunction.json)

2. Select the preferred **Subscription**, **Resource Group**, and **Location**.

3. Enter the below information in the deployment form:

	 a. **DetectionAlertsTableName** - Custom Log Analytics table name to store detection alerts. Default: `DetectionAlerts`. (_Note: `_CL` suffix is appended automatically._)

	 b. **GoogleSecopsProjectId** - Google Cloud project ID hosting the Google SecOps instance. Obtained in Step 1.

	 c. **GoogleSecopsRegion** - Google SecOps instance region. Select from the dropdown list of supported regions. Obtained in Step 1.

	 d. **GoogleSecopsInstanceId** - Google SecOps instance ID. Obtained in Step 1.

	 e. **GoogleSecopsServiceAccountJson** - Full JSON content of the downloaded Google Cloud service account key file. Obtained in Step 1.

	 f. **GoogleOAuthScope** - Google OAuth scope for service account authentication. Default: `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform`. Keep the default unless your organization requires a different scope.

	 g. **FunctionName** - Prefix for the Azure Function App name (1-11 characters). Default: `GSDAlerts`.

	 h. **LookbackDays** - Number of days to look back for the initial data pull (range: 1-7, default: 1). Subsequent runs automatically resume from the saved checkpoint.

	 i. **FetchSchedule** - CRON expression controlling how often the connector polls the Google SecOps API. Default: `0 */10 * * * *` (every 10 minutes).

	 j. **IngestSchedule** - CRON expression controlling how often saved detections are ingested into Sentinel. Default: `0 2/10 * * * *` (every 10 minutes, offset by 2 minutes).

	 k. **LogLevel** - Application log verbosity. Allowed values: `DEBUG`, `INFO`, `WARNING`, `ERROR`. Default: `INFO`.

	 l. **TenantId** - Directory (tenant) ID of your Microsoft Entra ID. Obtained in Step 2.

	 m. **AzureClientId** - Application (client) ID of the registered app. Obtained in Step 2.

	 n. **AzureClientSecret** - Client secret value of the registered app. Obtained in Step 3.

	 o. **AzureEntraObjectID** - Object ID of the registered app from Enterprise Applications. Obtained in Step 4.

	 p. **WorkspaceName** - Name of your Log Analytics workspace. Obtained in Step 5.

	 q. **AppInsightsWorkspaceResourceID** - Full resource ID of your Log Analytics workspace. Obtained in Step 5.

	 r. **Location** - Azure region for deploying data collection rules and endpoints. Defaults to the resource group location.

4. Mark the checkbox labeled **I agree to the terms and conditions stated above**.

5. Click **Review + Create** and then **Create** to deploy.
instructionSteps.title: Azure Resource Manager (ARM) Template

instructionSteps.description:
**STEP 7 - Verify Data Ingestion**

1. After deployment completes (10-20 minutes), navigate to your Log Analytics workspace.
2. Run the following query to verify data is arriving:

	```kusto
	DetectionAlerts_CL
	| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
	| summarize Count=count()
	```

instructionSteps.description:
**STEP 7 - Verify Data Ingestion**

1. After deployment completes (10-20 minutes), navigate to your Log Analytics workspace.

properties.description: GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
let SeverityLookup = datatable(
    severity: string,
    severity_level: int
)[
    "CRITICAL", 5,
    "HIGH", 4,
    "MEDIUM", 3,
    "LOW", 2,
    "INFO", 1
];
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, id: string) [];
let GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
    DetectionAlerts_CL
    | extend
        detection_array=column_ifexists("detection", dynamic([]))
    | where isnotnull(detection_array) and array_length(detection_array) > 0
    | mv-expand detection=detection_array
    | extend
        DetectionType=column_ifexists("DetectionType", ""),
        createdTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("createdTime [UTC]", "")),
        id=column_ifexists("id", ""),
        timeWindow=column_ifexists("timeWindow", dynamic(null)),
        timeWindow_startTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_startTime [UTC]", "")),
        timeWindow_endTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_endTime [UTC]", "")),
        collectionElements=column_ifexists("collectionElements", dynamic(null)),
        detectionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("detectionTime [UTC]", "")),
        detectionTimingDetails=column_ifexists("detectionTimingDetails", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency", ""),
        ruleName=tostring(detection.ruleName),
        ruleId=tostring(detection.ruleId),
        ruleVersion=tostring(detection.ruleVersion),
        ruleType=tostring(detection.ruleType),
        severity=tostring(detection.severity),
        alertState=tostring(detection.alertState),
        urlBackToProduct=tostring(detection.urlBackToProduct),
        description=tostring(detection.description),
        detectionFields=detection.detectionFields,
        ruleLabels=detection.ruleLabels,
        outcomes=detection.outcomes
    | lookup SeverityLookup on severity
    | extend
        EventVendor="Google Chronicle Security",
        EventProduct="Chronicle",
        EventType="Detection",
        ts=createdTime,
        detection_id=id,
        alert_state=alertState,
        rule_type=ruleType,
        alert_severity=severity
    | extend
        severity_level=coalesce(severity_level, 0),
        detection_window_duration_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(timeWindow_startTime) and isnotnull(timeWindow_endTime),
            datetime_diff('second', timeWindow_endTime, timeWindow_startTime),
            int(null)
        ),
        ingestion_latency_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime) and isnotnull(latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime),
            datetime_diff('second', latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime, latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime),
            int(null)
        )
    | extend
        is_high_severity=iff(severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL"), "true", "false"),
        is_active_alert=iff(alertState == "ALERTING", "true", "false")
    | extend
        variables=detection.variables,
        risk_score=toint(detection.riskScore)
    | extend
        var_adversary_name=tostring(variables.adversary_name.value),
        var_adversary_netid=tostring(variables.adversary_netid.value),
        var_adversary_uid=tostring(variables.adversary_uid.value),
        var_correlation_domain=tostring(variables.correlation_domain.value),
        var_correlation_ip=tostring(variables.correlation_ip.value),
        var_cyware_confidence_score=tostring(variables.cyware_confidence_score.value),
        var_e1_email_address=tostring(variables.e1_email_address.value),
        var_e1_ip=tostring(variables.e1_ip.value),
        var_e1_resource_name=tostring(variables.e1_resource_name.value),
        var_e2_email_address=tostring(variables.e2_email_address.value),
        var_e2_ip=tostring(variables.e2_ip.value),
        var_e2_resource_name=tostring(variables.e2_resource_name.value),
        var_email_address=tostring(variables.email_address.value),
        var_event_count=tostring(variables.event_count.value),
        var_ip=tostring(variables.ip.value),
        var_principal_asset_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_asset_hostname.value),
        var_principal_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_hostname.value),
        var_principal_ip=tostring(variables.principal_ip.value),
        var_principal_ip_count=tostring(variables.principal_ip_count.value),
        var_principal_mac=tostring(variables.principal_mac.value),
        var_principal_user_userid=tostring(variables.principal_user_userid.value),
        var_product_name=tostring(variables.product_name.value),
        var_resource_name=tostring(variables.resource_name.value),
        var_result=tostring(variables.result.value),
        var_result_time=tostring(variables.result_time.value),
        var_risk_score=tostring(variables.risk_score.value),
        var_service_account=tostring(variables.service_account.value),
        var_serviceaccount=tostring(variables.serviceaccount.value),
        var_source_hostname=tostring(variables.source_hostname.value),
        var_source_ip=tostring(variables.source_ip.value),
        var_source_ip_count=tostring(variables.source_ip_count.value),
        var_source_mac=tostring(variables.source_mac.value),
        var_source_user_userid=tostring(variables.source_user_userid.value),
        var_target_hostname=tostring(variables.target_hostname.value),
        var_target_ip=tostring(variables.target_ip.value),
        var_target_mac=tostring(variables.target_mac.value),
        var_target_user_userid=tostring(variables.target_user_userid.value),
        var_user=tostring(variables.user.value),
        var_vendor_name=tostring(variables.vendor_name.value),
        var_victim_name=tostring(variables.victim_name.value),
        var_victim_uid=tostring(variables.victim_uid.value)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        detectionType = DetectionType,
        detection,
        createdTime,
        id,
        timeWindow,
        timeWindowStartTime = timeWindow_startTime,
        timeWindowEndTime = timeWindow_endTime,
        collectionElements,
        detectionTime,
        detectionTimingDetails,
        latencyMetrics,
        latencyMetricsOldestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsOldestEventTime = latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestEventTime = latencyMetrics_newestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsIngestionLatency = latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency,
        eventVendor = EventVendor,
        eventProduct = EventProduct,
        eventType = EventType,
        ts,
        detectionId = detection_id,
        ruleName,
        ruleId,
        ruleVersion,
        ruleType,
        severity,
        severityLevel = severity_level,
        alertState = alert_state,
        isHighSeverity = is_high_severity,
        isActiveAlert = is_active_alert,
        description,
        urlBackToProduct,
        riskScore = risk_score,
        detectionFields,
        ruleLabels,
        outcomes,
        variables,
        varCorrelationIp = var_correlation_ip,
        varPrincipalIp = var_principal_ip,
        varPrincipalIpCount = var_principal_ip_count,
        varSourceIpCount = var_source_ip_count,
        varTargetIp = var_target_ip,
        varTargetHostname = var_target_hostname,
        varTargetUserUserid = var_target_user_userid,
        varSourceIp = var_source_ip,
        varSourceHostname = var_source_hostname,
        varSourceUserUserid = var_source_user_userid,
        varSourceMac = var_source_mac,
        varTargetMac = var_target_mac,
        varPrincipalMac = var_principal_mac,
        varPrincipalHostname = var_principal_hostname,
        varPrincipalUserUserid = var_principal_user_userid,
        detectionWindowDurationSeconds = detection_window_duration_seconds,
        ingestionLatencySeconds = ingestion_latency_seconds
};
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts

let SeverityLookup = datatable(
    severity: string,
    severity_level: int
)[
    "CRITICAL", 5,
    "HIGH", 4,
    "MEDIUM", 3,
    "LOW", 2,
    "INFO", 1
];
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, id: string) [];
let GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
    DetectionAlerts_CL
    | extend
        detection_array=column_ifexists("detection", dynamic([]))
    | where isnotnull(detection_array) and array_length(detection_array) > 0
    | mv-expand detection=detection_array
    | extend
        DetectionType=column_ifexists("DetectionType", ""),
        createdTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("createdTime [UTC]", "")),
        id=column_ifexists("id", ""),
        timeWindow=column_ifexists("timeWindow", dynamic(null)),
        timeWindow_startTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_startTime [UTC]", "")),
        timeWindow_endTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_endTime [UTC]", "")),
        collectionElements=column_ifexists("collectionElements", dynamic(null)),
        detectionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("detectionTime [UTC]", "")),
        detectionTimingDetails=column_ifexists("detectionTimingDetails", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency", ""),
        ruleName=tostring(detection.ruleName),
        ruleId=tostring(detection.ruleId),
        ruleVersion=tostring(detection.ruleVersion),
        ruleType=tostring(detection.ruleType),
        severity=tostring(detection.severity),
        alertState=tostring(detection.alertState),
        urlBackToProduct=tostring(detection.urlBackToProduct),
        description=tostring(detection.description),
        detectionFields=detection.detectionFields,
        ruleLabels=detection.ruleLabels,
        outcomes=detection.outcomes
    | lookup SeverityLookup on severity
    | extend
        EventVendor="Google Chronicle Security",
        EventProduct="Chronicle",
        EventType="Detection",
        ts=createdTime,
        detection_id=id,
        alert_state=alertState,
        rule_type=ruleType,
        alert_severity=severity
    | extend
        severity_level=coalesce(severity_level, 0),
        detection_window_duration_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(timeWindow_startTime) and isnotnull(timeWindow_endTime),
            datetime_diff('second', timeWindow_endTime, timeWindow_startTime),
            int(null)
        ),
        ingestion_latency_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime) and isnotnull(latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime),
            datetime_diff('second', latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime, latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime),
            int(null)
        )
    | extend
        is_high_severity=iff(severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL"), "true", "false"),
        is_active_alert=iff(alertState == "ALERTING", "true", "false")
    | extend
        variables=detection.variables,
        risk_score=toint(detection.riskScore)
    | extend
        var_adversary_name=tostring(variables.adversary_name.value),
        var_adversary_netid=tostring(variables.adversary_netid.value),
        var_adversary_uid=tostring(variables.adversary_uid.value),
        var_correlation_domain=tostring(variables.correlation_domain.value),
        var_correlation_ip=tostring(variables.correlation_ip.value),
        var_cyware_confidence_score=tostring(variables.cyware_confidence_score.value),
        var_e1_email_address=tostring(variables.e1_email_address.value),
        var_e1_ip=tostring(variables.e1_ip.value),
        var_e1_resource_name=tostring(variables.e1_resource_name.value),
        var_e2_email_address=tostring(variables.e2_email_address.value),
        var_e2_ip=tostring(variables.e2_ip.value),
        var_e2_resource_name=tostring(variables.e2_resource_name.value),
        var_email_address=tostring(variables.email_address.value),
        var_event_count=tostring(variables.event_count.value),
        var_ip=tostring(variables.ip.value),
        var_principal_asset_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_asset_hostname.value),
        var_principal_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_hostname.value),
        var_principal_ip=tostring(variables.principal_ip.value),
        var_principal_ip_count=tostring(variables.principal_ip_count.value),
        var_principal_mac=tostring(variables.principal_mac.value),
        var_principal_user_userid=tostring(variables.principal_user_userid.value),
        var_product_name=tostring(variables.product_name.value),
        var_resource_name=tostring(variables.resource_name.value),
        var_result=tostring(variables.result.value),
        var_result_time=tostring(variables.result_time.value),
        var_risk_score=tostring(variables.risk_score.value),
        var_service_account=tostring(variables.service_account.value),
        var_serviceaccount=tostring(variables.serviceaccount.value),
        var_source_hostname=tostring(variables.source_hostname.value),
        var_source_ip=tostring(variables.source_ip.value),
        var_source_ip_count=tostring(variables.source_ip_count.value),
        var_source_mac=tostring(variables.source_mac.value),
        var_source_user_userid=tostring(variables.source_user_userid.value),
        var_target_hostname=tostring(variables.target_hostname.value),
        var_target_ip=tostring(variables.target_ip.value),
        var_target_mac=tostring(variables.target_mac.value),
        var_target_user_userid=tostring(variables.target_user_userid.value),
        var_user=tostring(variables.user.value),
        var_vendor_name=tostring(variables.vendor_name.value),
        var_victim_name=tostring(variables.victim_name.value),
        var_victim_uid=tostring(variables.victim_uid.value)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        detectionType = DetectionType,
        detection,
        createdTime,
        id,
        timeWindow,
        timeWindowStartTime = timeWindow_startTime,
        timeWindowEndTime = timeWindow_endTime,
        collectionElements,
        detectionTime,
        detectionTimingDetails,
        latencyMetrics,
        latencyMetricsOldestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsOldestEventTime = latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestEventTime = latencyMetrics_newestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsIngestionLatency = latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency,
        eventVendor = EventVendor,
        eventProduct = EventProduct,
        eventType = EventType,
        ts,
        detectionId = detection_id,
        ruleName,
        ruleId,
        ruleVersion,
        ruleType,
        severity,
        severityLevel = severity_level,
        alertState = alert_state,
        isHighSeverity = is_high_severity,
        isActiveAlert = is_active_alert,
        description,
        urlBackToProduct,
        riskScore = risk_score,
        detectionFields,
        ruleLabels,
        outcomes,
        variables,
        varCorrelationIp = var_correlation_ip,
        varPrincipalIp = var_principal_ip,
        varPrincipalIpCount = var_principal_ip_count,
        varSourceIpCount = var_source_ip_count,
        varTargetIp = var_target_ip,
        varTargetHostname = var_target_hostname,
        varTargetUserUserid = var_target_user_userid,
        varSourceIp = var_source_ip,
        varSourceHostname = var_source_hostname,
        varSourceUserUserid = var_source_user_userid,
        varSourceMac = var_source_mac,
        varTargetMac = var_target_mac,
        varPrincipalMac = var_principal_mac,
        varPrincipalHostname = var_principal_hostname,
        varPrincipalUserUserid = var_principal_user_userid,
        detectionWindowDurationSeconds = detection_window_duration_seconds,
        ingestionLatencySeconds = ingestion_latency_seconds
};
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts

properties.description: Creates incidents in Microsoft Sentinel when Google Security Operations raises an active threat intelligence alert (GCTI_FINDING). These alerts are generated by Google's global threat intel corpus and represent high-confidence threats, distinct from customer-authored rule detections.
properties.displayName: Google SecOps - GCTI Threat Intelligence Finding

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Google Threat Intelligence confirmed finding. Rule: {{ruleName}}. {{description}}

properties.displayName: Google SecOps - GCTI Threat Intelligence Finding

properties.description: Creates incidents in Microsoft Sentinel when Google Security Operations raises an active single-event alert (SINGLE_EVENT, riskScore >= 40) at MEDIUM, HIGH, or CRITICAL severity. These alerts represent a single action — malware execution, credential abuse, or defense evasion — severe enough to trigger an incident without requiring multi-signal correlation.
properties.query:
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts
| where ruleType == "SINGLE_EVENT"
| where severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL", "MEDIUM")
| where riskScore >= 40
| where alertState == "ALERTING"

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Google SecOps flagged a single high-severity event as an active alert requiring immediate action. Rule: {{ruleName}}.

properties.description: Creates incidents in Microsoft Sentinel when Google Security Operations raises an active multi-event correlated alert (MULTI_EVENT, riskScore >= 40) at HIGH or CRITICAL severity. These alerts indicate complex attack patterns — lateral movement, staged persistence, or command-and-control — identified by correlating multiple signals across a time window.
properties.query:
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts
| where ruleType == "MULTI_EVENT"
| where severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL")
| where riskScore >= 40
| where alertState == "ALERTING"

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Google SecOps correlated multiple events into a confirmed alert. Rule: {{ruleName}}.

properties.description: Creates one incident per active Google Security Operations detection alert in Microsoft Sentinel. Covers all rule types and severity levels with no additional filtering, providing broad visibility across all Google SecOps alerts. Use alongside focused rules for complete detection coverage.

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Google SecOps detection alert. Rule: {{ruleName}}. Severity: {{severity}}. Type: {{ruleType}}.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Google SecOps solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides the capability to ingest detection alerts from Google SecOps (formerly Chronicle) into Microsoft Sentinel using the legacyStreamDetectionAlerts API.

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 1, Analytic Rules: 4

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
